sql.query: SELECT l.id,l.locationName,l.locationType,l.townCity,l.postcode,l.isActive,CONCAT(l.locationName,CASE WHEN NULLIF(l.townCity,'') IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(' - ',l.townCity) ELSE '' END,CASE WHEN l.isActive=0 THEN ' (inactive)' ELSE '' END) AS locationLabel FROM tbl_locations l WHERE l.tenantId=:tenantId AND (l.isActive=1 OR l.id=:selectedId) ORDER BY l.isActive DESC,l.sortOrder,l.locationName
